genre_refs: 'Make America Great Again' slogan riff; iconic 9/11-era ironworker / Lunch atop a Skyscraper imagery
description: A vertical slogan graphic built on a photograph of a hard-hatted construction ironworker, seen from behind in a red shirt, brown tool belt and dusty work pants, walking out along a steel I-beam above a hazy city skyline of skyscrapers far below. A large American flag is overlaid semi-transparently across the top of the image, blending into the sky. Centered over the photo in large white serif capitals is the text 'AMERICAN WORKERS' / (gold-colored) 'MAKE' flanked by thin gold rule lines / 'AMERICA GREAT'. A circular U.S. Department of Labor seal sits at the bottom center. The image is in sepia and warm desaturated tones.
